title: APackByRandomGuy (ABGV)
description: This pack elevates your Minecraft experience with elite performance, crisp visuals, and ViaFabricPlus for cross-version multiplayer, all while keeping the classic Vanilla soul. It’s a purely non-profit collection of community-made mods.
body:
This modpack is designed to polish the core gameplay without losing the classic "Vanilla" feel. We’ve focused on three main pillars:

**Stunning Visuals:** Subtle graphical enhancements that make your world look more vibrant and immersive.
**Seamless Performance:** Optimized to ensure high FPS and smooth gameplay, even on lower-end hardware.
**Quality of Life (QoL):** Dozens of small tweaks and features that remove the "clutter" and make your daily adventures more intuitive.

One of the standout features is the **inclusion of ViaFabricPlus**. This allows you to connect to older server versions while staying on the latest release.
Note: The cross-version compatibility via ViaFabricPlus is intended for Multiplayer use only.

This pack is a **curated collection** of work created by the incredible Minecraft modding community. I **did not develop** these mods; I simply hand-picked and configured them to work perfectly together with my preferences.
Because this is a community-driven project, this **pack is 100% non-profit**. If you enjoy the experience, please go and **check out the individual mod pages** to support the original developers.

If you have questions or wan´t to see some mods within this modpack, feel free to contact me via the Commentssection or write an E-Mail to business@derblindemann.de.
